name: comath-pi-lab
description: Auditable Pi-based agentic mathematics research workbench skeleton.

scripts.test: node scripts/phase0-smoke.mjs && node tests/release/ga-readiness.test.mjs && corepack pnpm -r --if-present test && node tests/evaluation/phase17-integrity-evaluation.test.mjs
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test
